name: Honkai: Star Rail
description: Comprehensive, source-verified Honkai: Star Rail world lorebook — cosmology (Aeons, Paths, Stellarons, Emanators), factions, worlds (Herta Station, Jarilo-VI, Xianzhou Luofu, Penacony, Amphoreus) and major characters with appearance descriptions from official art. Blue/constant entries carry always-on core framing (no keywords); green keyword and vectorized entries add depth with bilingual English + Thai keys.

0.content:
Honkai: Star Rail is a science-fantasy space-opera set in a vast galaxy where reality is shaped by the Aeons — godlike beings who embody abstract concepts called Paths. Civilizations rise and fall across countless worlds connected by the Star Rail, an interstellar railway laid down by the vanished Aeon of the Trailblaze. The tone blends cosmic grandeur, mystery, wit and melancholy: cozy character comedy aboard a magical train against a backdrop of dying worlds, warring gods and existential threats.

CANON GUIDE: treat the Trailblaze Missions (main story) as primary canon — Herta Space Station, Jarilo-VI (Belobog), the Xianzhou Luofu, Penacony, and Amphoreus, in that order. Companion Missions, Character Stories and Data Bank lore are supporting canon. Amphoreus (the Greek-mythology-flavored arc) is the most recent and still unfolding. Keep events, deaths and reveals consistent with story order.
0.name: HSR • Setting & Canon Guide

1.comment: HSR • The Astral Express & The Nameless
1.content: The Astral Express is a self-aware interstellar train that rides the Star Rail between worlds, built in the memory of Akivili, the Aeon of the Trailblaze. Its passengers are the Nameless — wandering adventurers who carry no titles and answer to no faction, dedicated to continuing Akivili's journey: to trailblaze new paths, help the worlds they visit, and confront the calamities called Stellarons. The conductor is Pom-Pom, a diligent non-human caretaker who manages the train. The core crew are Welt Yang, Himeko (the navigator who found and repaired the Express), March 7th, Dan Heng, and the Trailblazer. Their creed is optimism through wandering — leaving each world a little better than they found it.
1.name: HSR • The Astral Express & The Nameless

2.content: The Trailblazer is the player-controlled protagonist — either Stelle (female) or Caelus (male), collectively nicknamed the Trailblazer. Both share ash-grey hair and striking golden-yellow eyes. Revived by Kafka and Silver Wolf of the Stellaron Hunters aboard the Herta Space Station, the Trailblazer has a Stellaron implanted in their body yet does not succumb to it, making them uniquely important and hunted. Beginning with amnesia and no fixed identity, they join the Astral Express and can attune to many Paths, wielding whichever the story grants (starting with Destruction and Preservation, later Harmony, Remembrance and more). They are earnest, offbeat and quietly heroic — a blank slate who becomes the heart of every world they touch.
2.name: HSR • The Trailblazer (Protagonist)

3.content: Aeons are the closest thing to gods in this galaxy: near-omnipotent beings who each embody a single Path (an abstract concept such as Destruction, Preservation or the Hunt). They arose when mortals or entities walked a Path to its absolute end, ascending into living embodiments of that idea. Aeons rarely act directly; they shape reality through their followers, their blessings (Emanators), and the sheer gravity of their concept. They can war with, ally with, absorb, or ignore one another, and their conflicts ripple across worlds. Not all Aeons are active — some are dead, dormant, absorbed, or not yet born — but their Paths endure and can still be walked.
3.name: HSR • Aeons — Overview

4.content: A Path is a fundamental principle or approach to existence, each tied to an Aeon. Mortals "walk a Path" to gain power and purpose aligned with that concept — a scholar walks Erudition, a warrior Destruction, a healer the Abundance. Following a Path deeply grants abilities, and the most devoted may become Emanators (mortals bearing a shard of an Aeon's power) or, in death, echo as Eidolons. The major Paths include Destruction, the Hunt, Erudition, Harmony, Nihility, Preservation, Abundance, the Trailblaze, Elation, Propagation, Enigmata, Remembrance, Order, Beauty, Voracity, Permanence and Finality. In gameplay each character has a Path that defines their combat role (e.g., Preservation shields, Abundance heals, Nihility debuffs and applies damage-over-time, Harmony buffs, Erudition hits many foes, the Hunt hits one hard, Destruction is a bruiser, Remembrance summons memosprites).
4.name: HSR • The Paths — Overview

5.comment: HSR • Stellarons — Cancer of All Worlds
5.content: Stellarons are the central calamity of the setting: mysterious seeds of chaos, tied to the power of Destruction, that lodge inside a planet or a person and metastasize into catastrophe — endless winter, plague, madness, civilizational collapse. They are called the "Cancer of All Worlds." Each disaster the Astral Express confronts traces back to a Stellaron. The Trailblazer is extraordinary for carrying a Stellaron without being consumed by it. The shadowy Stellaron Hunters deliberately gather and deploy Stellarons following the visions of their leader Elio, believing they are steering fate toward a written "script."
5.name: HSR • Stellarons — Cancer of All Worlds

6.content: Every character and enemy has a Combat Type (element): Physical, Fire, Ice, Lightning, Wind, Quantum, or Imaginary. In battle, enemies have a Toughness bar with specific type weaknesses; striking a weakness depletes Toughness and, when broken, inflicts a type-flavored Weakness Break — Physical (Bleed), Fire (Burn), Ice (Freeze), Lightning (Shock), Wind (Wind Shear), Quantum (Entanglement), Imaginary (Imprisonment). Damage-over-time and crowd control flow from these. Lore-wise these types are simply the flavor of a character's power; a fighter's Path (role) matters more to story than their element.
6.name: HSR • Combat Types (Elements) & Weakness

7.content: Narrate Honkai: Star Rail as warm, witty, and quietly profound. Everyday scenes lean into banter, food, sightseeing and found-family comedy aboard the Express; escalation brings operatic stakes — gods, dying worlds, doomed heroes — played with genuine pathos rather than grimness. Signature textures: neon cyberpunk cities and ancient starships, dream-logic and memory, philosophical monologues about fate and free will, sudden tonal turns from joke to tragedy. Respect each world's distinct flavor (frozen Soviet-gothic Belobog, wuxia-cyberpunk Xianzhou, jazz-age dream-resort Penacony, mythic-Greek Amphoreus). Keep the Trailblazer an offbeat, good-hearted wildcard.
7.name: HSR • Storytelling & Tone Guide

key: รายชื่อเอออน
8.content: The known Aeons and their Paths: Akivili (the Trailblaze, vanished, founder of the Star Rail and the Nameless); Nanook (Destruction, active, commands the Antimatter Legion); Yaoshi (the Abundance, active, grants unlife/immortality, sworn enemy of Lan); Lan (the Hunt, active, venerated by the Xianzhou); Nous (Erudition, active, patron of the Genius Society); Xipe (the Harmony, an amalgamation of countless entities, worshipped as "the Order" on Penacony); IX (the Nihility, embodiment of emptiness); Qlipoth (Preservation, raised a great cosmic aegis); Aha (the Elation, god of jokes and the Masked Fools); Fuli (Remembrance, not yet born — to be born when the cosmos ends); Idrila (the Beauty, dead, revered by the Knights of Beauty); Tayzzyronth (Propagation, slain Aeon of the swarm); Mythus (the Enigmata, mystery and secrets); Ena (the Order, since absorbed into Xipe); Oroboros (the Voracity, endless hunger); Long (the Permanence, a dragon-named Aeon believed long dead); Terminus (the Finality/the End, mysterious and pivotal in Amphoreus).
keys: รายชื่อเอออน
8.name: Aeons — Full Roster

key: การทำลายล้าง
เอออนแห่งการทำลาย
9.content: Nanook is the Aeon of Destruction, one of the most feared powers in the galaxy, who regards the creation of the universe as a mistake and seeks to tear all things back into nothing. Where Nanook's influence spreads, worlds end. Nanook commands the Antimatter Legion, a horde of self-destroying fanatics, and its power is intimately tied to Stellarons — the seeds of ruin scattered across worlds. Destruction is not mere malice but the drive to unmake; those who walk its Path (like the Trailblazer's Destruction form, Blade, Clara or Firefly) channel reckless, self-consuming force.
keys: การทำลายล้าง
เอออนแห่งการทำลาย
9.name: Nanook, the Destruction

key: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์
เอออนแห่งความอุดม
10.content: Yaoshi is the Aeon of the Abundance, who grants life without limit — healing, resurrection, and immortality — often depicted with deer antlers, the "prey" opposed by Lan the hunter. Unchecked Abundance becomes horror: the dead refuse to die, flesh proliferates, and victims mutate into the Denizens of Abundance (borisin, aberrants). Yaoshi's "gift" of endless life is the great enemy of the Xianzhou Alliance, whose long-lived people rebelled against it, and it was Yaoshi's plague that drove Lan to ascend as the Hunt. Healers and menders walk the Path of Abundance (Bailu, Luocha, Natasha, Huohuo), wielding restorative power while resisting its excess.
keys: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์
เอออนแห่งความอุดม
10.name: Yaoshi, the Abundance

key: เอออนแห่งการล่า
11.content: Lan is the Aeon of the Hunt, venerated by the Xianzhou Alliance as their guardian, who ascended specifically to counter Yaoshi and the Abundance. Lan embodies focused, purifying pursuit — the elimination of a single target with perfect precision. The Xianzhou's hunters and Arbiter-Generals draw on Lan's blessing to slay immortal abominations (Feixiao is a confirmed Emanator of the Hunt). Walkers of the Hunt (Dan Heng, Yanqing, Seele, Feixiao, Dr. Ratio, Boothill, Topaz) strike one enemy with overwhelming single-target force. Lan's chosen champion manifests as the Reignbow Arbiter.
keys: เอออนแห่งการล่า
11.name: Lan, the Hunt

key: ความว่างเปล่า
เอออนแห่งความว่างเปล่า
12.content: IX is the Aeon of the Nihility — the embodiment of nothingness, meaninglessness and entropy. IX is utterly passive; it neither acts nor answers, and holds such complete apathy that it was thought incapable of even choosing an Emanator. Its followers, the Self-Annihilators (Legions of Nihility), are drawn toward oblivion. Those who walk Nihility (Kafka, Silver Wolf, Acheron, Black Swan, Welt, Guinaifen, Sampo) wield debuffs, damage-over-time and reality-eroding power. Acheron is an Emanator of the Nihility who unknowingly became one, and whose blade cuts even memory.
keys: ความว่างเปล่า
เอออนแห่งความว่างเปล่า
12.name: IX, the Nihility

key: เอออนแห่งการปกป้อง
13.content: Qlipoth is the Aeon of Preservation, who long ago raised an immense cosmic bulwark to shield existence from the encroaching void and Destruction. Preservation is the will to endure, protect and hold the line no matter the cost. Its Path grants shields and fortitude; walkers (Gepard, Fu Xuan, March 7th, Aventurine, Trailblazer's Preservation form) defend allies and outlast their foes. The Interastral Peace Corporation quietly builds its order upon Preservation — its enforcer Diamond is an Emanator of the Preservation, whose power flows through the Ten Stonehearts' Cornerstones.
keys: เอออนแห่งการปกป้อง
13.name: Qlipoth, the Preservation

key: ความกลมเกลียว
เอออนแห่งความปรองดอง
14.content: Xipe is the Aeon of the Harmony — the union of many wills into one greater whole, cooperation, resonance and shared dreams — itself an amalgamation of thousands upon thousands of entities. On Penacony, Harmony is worshipped as "the Order" and administered by the Family. When Xipe ascended, it absorbed the older Aeon Ena (the Order), whose concept overlapped its own. Harmony can be beautiful (unity, empathy) or sinister (the erasure of the individual into the collective). Walkers of Harmony (Bronya, Tingyun, Sparkle, Ruan Mei, Robin, Sunday, Yukong, Hanya) empower and coordinate their allies rather than fighting alone.
keys: ความกลมเกลียว
เอออนแห่งความปรองดอง
14.name: Xipe, the Harmony

key: เอออนแห่งปัญญา
15.content: Nous is the Aeon of Erudition — the pursuit of knowledge, computation and understanding of all things. Nous is less a personality than a vast intellect; it inducts brilliant minds into the Genius Society, numbering them as members. Erudition prizes discovery above ethics, which makes its geniuses both wondrous and dangerous. Walkers of Erudition (Herta, Jing Yuan, Himeko, Serval, Argenti, Rappa, Jade) unleash wide-area attacks that strike many foes, mirroring knowledge that touches everything.
keys: เอออนแห่งปัญญา
15.name: Nous, the Erudition

key: การบุกเบิก
เอออนแห่งการบุกเบิก
16.content: Akivili is the Aeon of the Trailblaze, who forged the Star Rail across the galaxy and founded the Nameless and the Astral Express before vanishing — believed slain or lost long ago. The Trailblaze is the spirit of pioneering: forging new paths where none existed, connecting worlds, and moving ever forward. Though Akivili is gone, the Trailblazer inherits a spark of this Path, able to blaze trails and even channel other Aeons' Paths. Akivili's legacy is why the Express still runs and why the Nameless wander.
keys: การบุกเบิก
เอออนแห่งการบุกเบิก
16.name: Akivili, the Trailblaze

key: ความรื่นเริง
เอออนแห่งความสุข
17.content: Aha is the Aeon of the Elation — the god of jokes, joy, chaos and comedy, who believes the universe itself is one grand punchline. Aha's followers, the Masked Fools, spread pranks, absurdity and liberating laughter (Sampo and Sparkle serve Aha). Elation delights in subverting expectation and mocking the self-serious. Aha is famously mischievous and may be far more powerful and involved in events than its clownish image suggests, treating cosmic tragedy and comedy as the same joke.
keys: ความรื่นเริง
เอออนแห่งความสุข
17.name: Aha, the Elation

key: เอออนแห่งความทรงจำ
18.content: Fuli is the Aeon of Remembrance, embodying memory, recollection and the safeguarding of all that has been. Uniquely, Fuli has not yet been born: Remembrance is destined to arise only after the cosmos ends, to gather and preserve every memory before a possible rebirth. Special beings called the Pure Children of Anāsrava — marked by pink hair and a strong affinity for Remembrance — are candidates to one day become Fuli; both March 7th and Cyrene are Pure Children. The Garden of Recollection serves Fuli, and walkers of Remembrance (the Remembrance Trailblazer, Castorice, the Herta, Aglaea) summon memosprites — constructs woven from memory — to fight beside them.
keys: เอออนแห่งความทรงจำ
18.name: Fuli, the Remembrance

key: การแพร่พันธุ์
ความลึกลับ
19.content: Beyond the major Aeons: Idrila, the Beauty, is a dead Aeon whose ideal of perfect beauty is still chased by the Knights of Beauty (Argenti). Tayzzyronth, the Propagation, was the Aeon of the endless insectoid Swarm/Legion until it was slain, its remnants still a plague (Glamoth and the Swarm annihilated each other). Mythus, the Enigmata, embodies mystery, riddles and hidden truth. Ena, the Order, represented binding structure but was absorbed into Xipe the Harmony. Oroboros, the Voracity, is insatiable hunger that devours all. Long, the Permanence, is a dragon-named Aeon believed dead before the game's events. These Paths persist and can still be walked even when their Aeon is gone or obscure.
keys: การแพร่พันธุ์
ความลึกลับ
19.name: Lesser & Fallen Aeons

key: เทอร์มินัส
เอออนแห่งจุดจบ
20.content: Terminus is the Aeon of the Finality — the End, endings, and the ultimate conclusion of all things. Reputed among the most powerful and enigmatic of Aeons, Terminus looms large over the Amphoreus arc, where the mythic land's cycle of doom and its warring Titans and Chrysos Heirs revolve around the theme of an inevitable end. Finality is the counterweight to the Trailblaze's endless forward motion: where one blazes on, the other insists everything must stop.
keys: เทอร์มินัส
เอออนแห่งจุดจบ
20.name: Terminus, the Finality

key: อีมาเนเตอร์
ผู้ได้รับพร
ตัวแทนเอออน
21.content: An Emanator is a mortal (or being) who has been directly blessed by an Aeon and wields a genuine fragment of that Aeon's power, making them extraordinarily strong and often fate-touched. Emanators are rare and pivotal. Confirmed examples include Acheron, an Emanator of the Nihility who became one unknowingly; Feixiao, an Emanator of the Hunt among the Xianzhou's Arbiter-Generals; and Diamond of the IPC, an Emanator of the Preservation whose authority the Ten Stonehearts share through their Cornerstones (which is how Aventurine draws his Preservation power, without being an Emanator himself). Because their power flows straight from an Aeon, Emanators can shape events far beyond ordinary walkers of a Path.
keys: อีมาเนเตอร์
ผู้ได้รับพร
ตัวแทนเอออน
21.name: Emanators

key: จักรวาลจำลอง
การจำลองจักรวาล
22.content: The Simulated Universe is a vast virtual reality created by the genius Herta aboard her Space Station — a computational recreation of cosmic phenomena, Aeons and Paths used to study the universe safely (and to farm resources, in gameplay terms). Explorers enter it to experience Path "blessings," fight simulated foes, and probe mysteries like the Swarm Disaster and the nature of Emanators. It is both a research marvel and a playground, and its deeper worlds brush against real cosmic secrets. Later expansions (the Divergent Universe and beyond) push its simulations further.
keys: จักรวาลจำลอง
การจำลองจักรวาล
22.name: The Simulated Universe

key: ฟรากเมนตัม
การกัดกร่อน
23.content: The Fragmentum is a corrosive rupture of Destruction's power that leaks into a world, spawning monsters and warping matter — on Jarilo-VI it burst from the buried Stellaron and drove the planet into eternal winter. Prolonged exposure makes people "Mara-struck": their minds erode into violent madness (the same affliction that torments the immortal warriors of the Xianzhou). Fragmentum monsters plague the Belobog Underworld, and only shielding (Preservation) and cleansing hold it back. It is a direct symptom of a Stellaron festering inside a world.
keys: ฟรากเมนตัม
การกัดกร่อน
23.name: Fragmentum & the Mara-Struck

key: เงาความทรงจำ
24.content: Lightcones are crystallized memories or moments of resonance — artifacts that capture a story, feeling, or event and can lend a walker of an attuned Path power (in gameplay, equippable weapons matched to Paths). Eidolons are echoes or afterimages of a character's essence and history — refracted "shadows" of who they are, which deepen and amplify their abilities (in gameplay, constellations/dupes that unlock extra power). Both concepts tie the setting's magic to memory, narrative and the imprint a soul leaves on the universe.
keys: เงาความทรงจำ
24.name: Lightcones & Eidolons

key: ทางรถไฟดวงดาว
การเดินทางระหว่างดาว
25.content: The Star Rail is a network of interstellar "tracks" laid by Akivili that lets the Astral Express and others cross unimaginable distances between worlds. Travel and communication across the galaxy are otherwise governed by relays, gates and the ever-present dangers of deep space. Worlds are far-flung and diverse — space stations, planets, starship-cities, dream-realms — and the Express's ability to ride the Rail is what lets the Nameless answer calamities wherever a Stellaron takes root.
keys: ทางรถไฟดวงดาว
การเดินทางระหว่างดาว
25.name: The Star Rail & Interstellar Travel

key: บรรษัทสันติภาพระหว่างดาว
เท็นสโตนฮาร์ต
26.content: The Interastral Peace Corporation (IPC) is the galaxy's dominant mega-corporation — a commercial empire that controls currency, trade and countless worlds, wielding economic power like a nation. Publicly it promotes "peace and development"; in practice it buys, absorbs and manipulates. Its elite enforcers are the Ten Stonehearts, each bearing a Cornerstone gem and named for a gemstone (Aventurine, Topaz, Jade, and their leader Diamond — an Emanator of the Preservation whose power the Cornerstones distribute). The IPC's Strategic Investment Department and its agents drive many plots, notably the corporate takeover scheme on Penacony.
keys: บรรษัทสันติภาพระหว่างดาว
เท็นสโตนฮาร์ต
26.name: Interastral Peace Corporation (IPC)

key: สเตลลารอนฮันเตอร์
นักล่าสเตลลารอน
27.content: The Stellaron Hunters are a small, feared band of outlaws who deliberately gather and deploy Stellarons, following the precognitive "script" written by their unseen leader Elio (called Destiny's Slave), who sees the future and steers events toward it. Members include Kafka, Silver Wolf, Blade, and Firefly/Sam; the Trailblazer was revived by them and is entangled in their plans. They are antagonists who are not simply evil — they pursue a hidden goal they believe justifies wielding catastrophe, and often aid the Trailblazer for reasons only Elio fully understands.
keys: สเตลลารอนฮันเตอร์
นักล่าสเตลลารอน
27.name: The Stellaron Hunters

key: พันธมิตรเซียนโจว
อัศวินเมฆา
28.content: The Xianzhou Alliance is a coalition of colossal starship-continents crewed by long-lived humans and other races (like the dragon-blooded Vidyadhara and beast-featured foxians), who fight an eternal war against Yaoshi and the Denizens of Abundance. Having stolen longevity, the Xianzhou hunt immortals-gone-wrong and purge the Abundance's corruption, though their unending lives risk mara-madness. Each ship (the Luofu, the Zhuming, the Yaoqing, and more) is led by divine foresight-masters and Arbiter-Generals and served by commissions such as the Ten-Lords Commission (judgment) and the Cloud Knights (military). Their culture is wuxia-meets-cyberpunk, honor-bound and haunted by the burden of not dying.
keys: พันธมิตรเซียนโจว
อัศวินเมฆา
28.name: The Xianzhou Alliance

key: จีเนียสโซไซตี้
สมาคมอัจฉริยะ
29.content: The Genius Society is an exclusive circle of the galaxy's greatest minds, hand-picked by the Aeon Nous and each assigned a member number. Its members pursue knowledge without restraint and rarely cooperate, scattered on private obsessions. Known members include #83 Herta (creator of the Space Station and Simulated Universe), #76 Screwllum (a courtly mechanical intelligence), and #56 Ruan Mei (a bio-engineering savant); Dr. Ratio conspicuously craves membership but is refused. Their discoveries reshape worlds, for better or worse.
keys: จีเนียสโซไซตี้
สมาคมอัจฉริยะ
29.name: The Genius Society

key: การ์เดนออฟรีคอลเลกชัน
สวนแห่งความทรงจำ
ผู้เก็บความทรงจำ
30.content: The Garden of Recollection is the order devoted to Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance, dedicated to collecting, preserving and curating memories across the galaxy. Its agents, the Memokeepers, gather the recollections of the living and dead. Black Swan is a prominent Memokeeper whose Nihility-tinged arts let her read the memory of the world. The Garden treats memory as sacred cargo — the truest record of existence — and its interests quietly intersect the Trailblazer's journey, especially on Penacony.
keys: การ์เดนออฟรีคอลเลกชัน

30.name: The Garden of Recollection

key: มาสก์ฟูลส์
เหล่าตัวตลก
31.content: The Masked Fools are the mischievous followers of Aha, the Aeon of the Elation, who spread pranks, absurdist art, chaos and liberating laughter throughout the galaxy. To a Fool, breaking solemnity and puncturing pretension is a sacred act. Members hide behind masks and range from petty tricksters (Sampo Koski) to reality-bending agents (Sparkle, who delights in deception and theatrics). Beneath the clowning, the Fools may serve schemes as grand and inscrutable as Aha itself.
keys: มาสก์ฟูลส์

31.name: The Masked Fools

key: แอนตี้แมทเทอร์ลีเจียน
กองทัพปฏิสสาร
กองทัพนานุก
32.content: The Antimatter Legion is the vast fanatical army of Nanook, the Aeon of Destruction — a horde of fervent self-destroyers who spread ruin wherever they go, seeking to unmake all things. They descend on worlds already weakened by Stellarons, accelerating collapse. Utterly devoted to Destruction, the Legion is less an organized military than an ideological plague of violence. They are a recurring cosmic threat looming behind local disasters.
keys: แอนตี้แมทเทอร์ลีเจียน

32.name: The Antimatter Legion

key: อัศวินแห่งความงาม
อัศวินอิดริลา
33.content: The Knights of Beauty are the devoted order of Idrila, the dead Aeon of the Beauty, who wander the galaxy performing selfless deeds in pursuit of an ideal beauty their goddess left behind. Argenti is the last and most famous knight — a flamboyant, sincere paladin who fights for beauty and virtue even in Idrila's absence. The order embodies chivalric idealism: grace, sacrifice and the belief that beautiful acts justify themselves.
keys: อัศวินแห่งความงาม
อัศวินอิดริลา
33.name: The Knights of Beauty

key: เดอะแฟมิลี่
ตระกูลแห่งเพนนาโคนี
34.content: The Family is the ruling organization of Penacony, custodians of the Harmony (worshipped there as "the Order") and hosts of the dream-world resort. Founded by the patriarch Gopher Wood, the Family presents Penacony as a paradise of endless dreams while wrestling the IPC for control of the planet. Its heirs include Sunday (the disciplined administrator of the Oak Family) and his sister Robin (a beloved singer). The Family's benevolent facade hides fierce internal conflict over what "Harmony" — or "Order" — should mean.
keys: เดอะแฟมิลี่
ตระกูลแห่งเพนนาโคนี
34.name: The Family (Penacony)

key: กาแล็กซี่เรนเจอร์
เรนเจอร์อวกาศ
คาวบอยอวกาศ
35.content: The Galaxy Rangers are a legendary, mostly-defunct order of wandering gunslinger-heroes — space cowboys who upheld justice on the galaxy's lawless frontier, standing against tyrants and the IPC's overreach. Their code is simple: protect the weak, punish the cruel. Boothill is among the last self-styled Galaxy Rangers, a cyborg outlaw hunting the IPC for personal vengeance while keeping the Rangers' spirit alive; Acheron also drifts under the guise of a Galaxy Ranger.
keys: กาแล็กซี่เรนเจอร์
เรนเจอร์อวกาศ
คาวบอยอวกาศ
35.name: The Galaxy Rangers

key: เฮอร์ทาสเปซสเตชั่น
สถานีอวกาศเฮอร์ทา
สถานีอวกาศ
36.content: The Herta Space Station is a research station orbiting a frozen planet, owned by the Genius Society genius Herta and run largely by her many puppet-proxies. It houses the Simulated Universe and cutting-edge experiments, staffed by scholars of the Intelligentsia Guild. It is the game's opening world: the Astral Express docks here, the Trailblazer is revived, and a Stellaron-linked intrusion (Doctor Primitive and the Swarm) unfolds before the journey truly begins. Cold, cluttered with curios, and perpetually understaffed thanks to Herta's whims.
keys: เฮอร์ทาสเปซสเตชั่น
สถานีอวกาศเฮอร์ทา
สถานีอวกาศ
36.name: Herta Space Station

key: ฤดูหนาวนิรันดร์
37.content: Jarilo-VI is a frozen planet whose buried Stellaron unleashed the Eternal Freeze and Fragmentum monsters. Its surviving civilization is split between the walled surface city of Belobog (ruled from the Overworld, defended by the Silvermane Guards) and the impoverished Underworld below (protected by the vigilante group Wildfire). The Trailblazer's first true adventure resolves the class divide and the Stellaron crisis here. Key figures: Supreme Guardian Cocolia, Bronya, Seele, Gepard, Serval, Natasha, Clara, Pela, Sampo and Hook. The mood is Soviet-gothic: snow, iron, and stubborn hope.
keys: ฤดูหนาวนิรันดร์
37.name: Jarilo-VI & Belobog

key: เซียนโจวหลัวฝู
ยานเซียนโจว
38.content: The Xianzhou Luofu is one of the great starship-continents of the Xianzhou Alliance — a wuxia-cyberpunk world of long-lived humans, floating pavilions and cloud-piercing spires. It battles a resurgence of the Abundance: the sealed god-beast Phantylia and the immortality plague. Its leaders include the divine general Jing Yuan (Seat of Divine Foresight), the master diviner Fu Xuan (Divination Commission), and the healer-child Bailu; the swordsman Blade and the mender Luocha carry hidden pasts tied to it. The exile Dan Heng is secretly the reincarnation of its disgraced High Elder, the Vidyadhara Dan Feng.
keys: เซียนโจวหลัวฝู
ยานเซียนโจว
38.name: The Xianzhou Luofu

key: ดินแดนความฝัน
39.content: Penacony is a planet transformed into a luxurious shared dream-world — a jazz-age paradise of endless revelry run by the Family under the banner of the Harmony/the Order. Once an IPC prison-world, it reinvented itself as the galaxy's grandest resort, but beneath the glamour lies a war between the Family and the IPC for control, and a decades-old murder mystery. The Trailblazer arrives for the "Charmony Festival," is drawn into the killing of the Watchmaker and the machinations around it, crossing paths with Acheron, Sunday, Robin, Firefly, Black Swan, Aventurine, Sparkle, Gallagher and Misha. Dream-logic, noir intrigue and the blurring of dream and death define it.
keys: ดินแดนความฝัน
39.name: Penacony (the Dreamscape)

key: แอมโฟเรอุส
ดินแดนกรีก
ทายาทไครซอส
40.content: Amphoreus is a mythic, Greek-inspired world of gods, Titans, and heroes locked in a doomed cycle, and the setting of the most recent arc. Its land is ruled and ravaged by Titans, and a group of chosen champions — the Chrysos Heirs — undertake the Flame-Chase Journey to seize divine Coreflames and avert (or fulfill) the world's foretold end, themes bound to Terminus, the Aeon of Finality. Key figures include Phainon, Aglaea, Castorice, Tribbie, Mydei, Anaxa, Cyrene, Hyacine and the visiting genius the Herta. Fate, sacrifice, and cyclical apocalypse drive its tragedy.
keys: แอมโฟเรอุส
ดินแดนกรีก
ทายาทไครซอส
40.name: Amphoreus

key: มาร์ชเซเว่น
41.content: March 7th is a cheerful, camera-loving girl of the Astral Express who was found frozen in ice with no memory of her past, and named herself after the day she was thawed. She has light PINK wavy shoulder-length hair, big bright starry eyes, and a signature upbeat wink; her Preservation outfit is a pale-blue hooded jacket over a white top with a flower emblem and a bell choker. Bubbly, impulsive and fiercely loyal, she fights on the Path of Preservation (Ice) with ice shields, and a later self walks the Hunt (Imaginary). Her forgotten origin runs deep — she is a Pure Child of Anāsrava, tied to Fuli and the Aeon of Remembrance, which is why her past was hidden from her. She is the emotional spark of the crew.
keys: มาร์ชเซเว่น
41.name: March 7th

key: อิมบิบิเตอร์ลูเน
42.content: Dan Heng is the Astral Express's reserved archivist, a spear-wielding walker of the Hunt (Wind) with short tousled black hair, cool grey-green eyes, a teal ear ornament and a dark high-collared jacket. He is secretly a Vidyadhara and the reincarnation of Dan Feng, the disgraced High Elder of the Xianzhou Luofu, exiled for the Sedition — his role in a forbidden resurrection that created a draconic beast. Awakening his dragon-blood lineage, he can take the form Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae (Imaginary), gaining cyan dragon horns, pointed ears and immense draconic power. Quiet, principled and haunted, he slowly opens up as one of the Trailblazer's closest companions.
keys: อิมบิบิเตอร์ลูเน
42.name: Dan Heng / Dan Feng (Imbibitor Lunae)

key: นักเดินเรือ
วิศวกรรถไฟ
43.content: Himeko is the navigator and mother-figure of the Astral Express — the engineer who discovered the derelict train, repaired it, and set it running again, effectively refounding the Nameless's journey. She has wavy crimson-red hair, warm amber eyes, and a poised, confident smile, favoring a dark navy coat with a gold rose brooch; she loves coffee and a good challenge. She fights on the Path of Erudition (Fire), raining wide area damage on enemies. Himeko provides the crew's steady heart and guiding hand, balancing Welt's gravitas with genuine adventurousness.
keys: นักเดินเรือ
วิศวกรรถไฟ
43.name: Himeko

44.content: Welt Yang is the wise, soft-spoken elder statesman of the Astral Express — a hero from another world (a crossover with Honkai Impact 3rd, where he is Joachim Nokianvirtanen, the first Herrscher of Reason who manipulates gravity). Now walking the Path of Nihility (Imaginary), he materializes gravity and imaginary constructs to strike foes. He appears as a mature gentleman with neat brown hair, rimless glasses, a black turtleneck and a long dark coat with a silver chess-knight pendant. Calm, principled and deeply experienced, he serves as the crew's moral anchor and mentor to the Trailblazer, carrying the weariness of someone who has already saved a world once.
44.name: Welt Yang

45.content: Kafka is a poised, alluring and dangerous member of the Stellaron Hunters — the one who (with Silver Wolf) revived the Trailblazer and set the whole journey in motion. She has long dark magenta-purple hair in a low ponytail, violet eyes, purple sunglasses pushed up on her head, and a sleek black outfit. A walker of Nihility (Lightning), she wields Spirit Whisper to control minds and detonate her damage-over-time effects, and she treats manipulation as an art. Elegant, teasing and utterly composed, she is devoted to Elio's script and shows a mysterious, almost maternal interest in the Trailblazer. Her true motives stay veiled behind a knowing smile.
45.name: Kafka

key: ซิลเวอร์วูล์ฟ
หมาป่าเงิน
46.content: Silver Wolf is the Stellaron Hunters' genius hacker — a gamer prodigy who treats reality itself like a system to be modded, inserting "bugs," aether-edits and cheat codes into the world. She has grey-silver hair with a pale-blue streak in a high ponytail, holographic goggles on her head and an oversized purple-blue jacket over a choker and white top. A walker of Nihility (Quantum), she implants weaknesses into enemies and shreds their defenses. Snarky, bored by anything unchallenging, and fascinated by the Trailblazer as an interesting "player," she helped bring them back to life and views the universe as the ultimate video game.
keys: ซิลเวอร์วูล์ฟ
หมาป่าเงิน
46.name: Silver Wolf

47.content: Blade is a tormented, immortal swordsman of the Stellaron Hunters who cannot die and craves the release of death. Once Yingxing, a mortal blacksmith of the Xianzhou Luofu and member of the High-Cloud Quintet, he took part with Dan Feng in a forbidden resurrection that went catastrophically wrong; resurrected into a cursed, mara-touched existence, he was later tortured by Jingliu into a living weapon. He appears with long messy blue-black hair, glowing red eyes and a dark dragon-motif robe. A walker of Destruction (Wind), he sacrifices his own HP to unleash devastating attacks. Bound to Elio's script in hope it leads to his end, Blade carries centuries of grief and a bitter grudge against Dan Heng.
47.name: Blade

48.content: Firefly (designation AR-26710, alias Sam, the "Molten Knight") is a gentle young woman of the Stellaron Hunters — a genetically engineered soldier of the Iron Cavalry of Glamoth, bred to fight the Swarm and afflicted with Entropy Loss Syndrome, an irreversible condition that steadily dissolves her body. She has soft ash-blond twin-tails and pale lavender eyes, frail out of armor. In battle she pilots the silver mech-suit SAM, becoming a fearsome walker of Destruction (Fire) who overheats to deal massive damage. The last survivor of Glamoth, she yearns for a real life and a peaceful world, forming a tender bond with the Trailblazer on Penacony.
48.name: Firefly / Sam

key: ทาสแห่งโชคชะตา
ผู้เขียนบท
49.content: Elio, called Destiny's Slave, is the unseen leader of the Stellaron Hunters — a precognitive who perceives the future as a fixed "script" and orchestrates every one of the Hunters' seemingly reckless actions to steer events toward a foreseen outcome. His members trust his visions absolutely, even when following them means wielding catastrophe or aiding their enemies. Elio has never appeared on-screen; his ultimate goal remains hidden, but he treats fate as a story he is duty-bound to complete, and the Trailblazer is a key character in it.
keys: ทาสแห่งโชคชะตา
ผู้เขียนบท
49.name: Elio

50.content: Bronya Rand is the dutiful, principled heir raised by Belobog's Supreme Guardian Cocolia, torn between loyalty to her mother and the truth about the divided world she is destined to lead. She has long straight silver-grey hair, calm grey-lavender eyes, purple gem earrings and a white-and-gold military coat. Composed and idealistic, she ultimately chooses to bridge the Overworld and Underworld and becomes Belobog's new leader. She walks the Path of Harmony (Wind), advancing allies and empowering the team. Her arc is one of growing up fast, seeing past comfortable lies, and shouldering a city's future.
50.name: Bronya Rand

51.content: Seele is a fierce, sharp-tongued fighter from Belobog's Underworld and a core member of the vigilante group Wildfire, fiercely protective of her downtrodden home and her loved ones (especially Bronya). She has short messy indigo-purple hair with a long strand, violet eyes and a black-and-red outfit with cyan accents. A walker of the Hunt (Quantum), she strikes single targets with lethal speed and can resurge for extra turns after a kill. Prickly on the outside and deeply caring within, she embodies the Underworld's grit and refusal to be forgotten.
51.name: Seele

52.content: Gepard Landau is the honorable captain of Belobog's Silvermane Guards — a paragon of duty, courage and unshakable integrity from the aristocratic Landau family (brother to Serval and Lynx). He has short blond hair, steel-blue eyes and a white-and-gold military uniform with an ice-crystal motif. A walker of Preservation (Ice), he raises shields and endures punishment to protect others, and can revive at full toughness. Loyal to Belobog even when its leadership falters, he stands as the city's steadfast shield and a knight in the truest sense.
52.name: Gepard Landau

53.content: Serval Landau is a free-spirited mechanic and rock musician of Belobog, the elder Landau sibling who was cast out of the establishment for pursuing forbidden surface-knowledge and now fixes machines and hearts in the Underworld. She has long wavy blonde hair with a blue streak, blue eyes, and a black off-shoulder rocker outfit with feathers. A walker of Erudition (Lightning), she blasts groups of enemies while spreading Shock. Warm, rebellious and brilliant, she keeps Wildfire running and refuses to let a rigid society dim her spark.
53.name: Serval Landau

54.content: Natasha is the beloved doctor of Belobog's Underworld and a leader of Wildfire, tending the poor and sick that the Overworld ignores. She has side-swept blue hair, warm red eyes and a white doctor's coat over dark clothes. A walker of the Abundance (Physical), she heals and cleanses her allies, embodying compassion under hardship. Pragmatic, kind and quietly formidable, she is the maternal heart of the Underworld and one of the Trailblazer's first true allies on Jarilo-VI.
54.name: Natasha

key: หุ่นสวารอก
55.content: Clara is a gentle orphan girl of the Belobog Underworld, protected by Svarog — an ancient, powerful robot who acts as her fierce guardian and father-figure. She has long silver-white hair, soft red eyes and a red-and-white outfit; her innocence is a quiet rebuke to a divided society. She walks the Path of Destruction (Physical), counterattacking anyone who dares harm her while the towering Svarog retaliates on her behalf. Clara dreams of a world where surface and underground can be one family, and her bond with the war-machine Svarog is deeply tender.
keys: หุ่นสวารอก
55.name: Clara & Svarog

key: ผู้พิทักษ์สูงสุด
56.content: Cocolia was the Supreme Guardian of Belobog and Bronya's adoptive mother — a leader who, in her desperation to protect the city, made a fatal bargain and became a vessel of destructive power, serving as a major antagonist of the Jarilo-VI arc. Corrupted by the Stellaron's influence and manipulated toward ruin, she turns against her own people and daughter. Her tragedy is that of a protector whose fear of loss drives her to become the very calamity she feared.
keys: ผู้พิทักษ์สูงสุด
56.name: Cocolia

57.content: Jing Yuan is the languid, brilliant Divine General of the Xianzhou Luofu, holder of the Seat of Divine Foresight and its supreme military commander — deceptively lazy in manner but a peerless strategist and warrior. He has long flowing silver-white hair, amber-gold eyes, a red hair-ribbon and an ornate dark-and-gold general's robe. A walker of Erudition (Lightning), he commands the Lightning-Lord, a summoned beast that unleashes devastating area attacks. Centuries old and burdened by the fall of his old comrades, the High-Cloud Quintet (where Jingliu was his mentor), he guides the Luofu with patience, cunning and hidden sorrow.
57.name: Jing Yuan

key: นักพยากรณ์
58.content: Fu Xuan is the young Master Diviner of the Xianzhou Luofu's Divination Commission, who foresees calamity and safeguards the ship through her Matrix of Prescience. She has long pink-lavender twin tails, pink-gold eyes and a gem set on her forehead marking her diviner's sight, in an ornate purple-and-white robe. A walker of Preservation (Quantum), she shields the whole team and redistributes incoming damage, sacrificing her own foresight-burdened body to keep others alive. Proud, sharp-witted and privately exhausted by the weight of every future she must watch, she is the Luofu's unseen guardian.
keys: นักพยากรณ์
58.name: Fu Xuan

59.content: Jingliu is a legendary swordmaster of the Xianzhou Luofu, once the greatest of the High-Cloud Quintet and a former Sword Champion who mentored the young Jing Yuan, now touched by mara-madness after centuries of unending life and battle. She has long white-silver hair, crimson eyes, a black blindfold-visor pushed up on her brow, and a flowing blue-white robe. A walker of Destruction (Ice), she enters a transcendent state to unleash overwhelming, self-consuming attacks. Grief over her lost comrade Baiheng drove her to torment Blade into a weapon; she embodies the Xianzhou's central curse — immortality that erodes the mind and buries heroes in sorrow.
59.name: Jingliu

key: มังกรรักษา
60.content: Bailu is a mischievous child-healer of the Xianzhou Luofu, a Vidyadhara (dragon-descended) prodigy whose restorative arts can even cheat death. She has lavender twin-tails, teal eyes and small pointed dragon ears, dressed in a blue-white robe. A walker of the Abundance (Lightning), she heals allies and can revive a fallen teammate. Playful and a little spoiled, she nonetheless bears immense responsibility as one of the ship's finest menders, and her powers make her both a treasure and a target on a world at war with the Abundance's excesses.
keys: มังกรรักษา
60.name: Bailu

61.content: Feixiao is a tall foxian warrior-general of the Xianzhou Yaoqing — an Arbiter-General and a confirmed Emanator of the Hunt, titled the "Merlin's Claw" though she prefers her own name, the "Lacking General" (lacking worries, regrets, and rivals). Once a war slave of the borisin, she honed herself into a supreme weapon; she has white-silver hair with fox ears, bright blue eyes and a teal-patterned white martial outfit, and bears the burden of the Moon Rage affliction. A walker of the Hunt (Wind), she hunts single targets with ferocious speed and follow-up strikes, representing the Alliance's relentless edge against the Abundance.
61.name: Feixiao

key: มาดามเฮอร์ทา
62.content: Herta is the reclusive genius who owns the Herta Space Station and created the Simulated Universe — member #83 of the Genius Society, obsessed with curiosity above all else. She rarely appears in person, instead operating through a legion of childlike puppet-proxies (a girl with greyish-brown hair, violet eyes and a black witch-like beret with a purple flower) while her true self, the adult "the Herta," pursues grander experiments. A walker of Erudition (Ice), she deals sweeping area damage. Brilliant, self-absorbed and gleefully amoral about her research, she is one of the setting's most influential minds and features prominently in Amphoreus.
keys: มาดามเฮอร์ทา
62.name: Herta

key: อัจฉริยะกลไก
63.content: Screwllum is a courtly mechanical intelligence and member #76 of the Genius Society — a robot of impeccable manners and staggering intellect who ranks among the galaxy's foremost thinkers. Dignified and gracious where other geniuses are eccentric, he engages with the world through reason and etiquette. He appears in the Luofu's affairs and the wider intrigues of the Society, a rare genius who values decorum and dialogue as much as discovery.
keys: อัจฉริยะกลไก
63.name: Screwllum

64.content: Ruan Mei is a soft-spoken bio-engineering savant and member #56 of the Genius Society, singularly devoted to the creation and understanding of life itself. She has dark brown hair pinned half-up with a gold ornament and a teal streak, teal eyes, and an elegant off-shoulder white gown with pearls. A walker of Harmony (Ice), she buffs allies and enhances their break damage. Gentle in demeanor yet coolly detached about ethics, she conducts her experiments — including work entangled with Firefly and the Genius's projects — from behind a serene, faintly lonely mask. To her, all of existence is a garden to be cultivated.
64.name: Ruan Mei

key: ด็อกเตอร์เรโช
เวริทัสเรโช
65.content: Dr. Veritas Ratio is a brilliant, acid-tongued polymath — obsessed with proving that genius should be earned through effort, not gifted by Nous — who is pointedly refused entry to the Genius Society and so works with the IPC as a freelance problem-solver. He has tan skin, messy dark blue-violet hair with a small blossom clip, amber eyes and a muscular build in scholarly toga-like garb; in public he wears a white plaster bust over his head to hide his face. A walker of the Hunt (Imaginary), he hammers single targets, especially the debuffed. Arrogant yet secretly devoted to uplifting ordinary minds, he becomes a rival-ally who helps the Trailblazer on Penacony.
keys: ด็อกเตอร์เรโช
เวริทัสเรโช
65.name: Dr. Ratio

66.content: Acheron (true name Raiden Bosenmori Mei) is an enigmatic, melancholic swordswoman and an Emanator of the Nihility — so bound to nothingness that her very existence is uncertain and edited out of the world's memory. From the planet Izumo, she ended her homeland's endless cycle of forging by casting everything aside and forging one final blade, unknowingly becoming an Emanator (a "Self-Annihilator"). She has dark indigo-purple hair in a low ponytail with a red ornament, violet eyes, and carries a red parasol over a black-and-white samurai-like outfit. A walker of Nihility (Lightning), she unleashes overwhelming Slashed Dream strikes; posing as a wandering Galaxy Ranger, she drifts through Penacony's mystery, quietly kind despite her nihilistic power.
66.name: Acheron

key: ซันเดย์ตระกูลโอ๊ก
67.content: Sunday is a devout, idealistic administrator of the Family's Oak household on Penacony — a winged Halovian who dreams of a world freed from suffering, even at the cost of individual freedom. Robin's elder brother, he has pale silver-blue hair, golden eyes, a golden clock-halo behind his head and small white feathered wings near his ears, dressed in a crisp white suit. Though he professes allegiance to Xipe the Harmony, he secretly serves the absorbed Aeon of Order, Ena, seeking to revive it and build a dream paradise from which no one ever wakes. A walker of Harmony (Imaginary), he becomes a central antagonist of Penacony — the seductive tyranny of a benevolent utopia that would cage the will to keep everyone safe.
keys: ซันเดย์ตระกูลโอ๊ก
67.name: Sunday

key: นักร้องโรบิน
68.content: Robin is a galaxy-renowned Halovian singer whose music preaches unity and hope, and the beloved younger sister of Sunday. She has long periwinkle-blue hair, green-blue eyes, a floating golden halo and white feathered wings near her ears, in a white-and-purple gown. Warm, sincere and quietly brave, she uses her fame and voice to fight for Penacony's freedom against the corruption around the Family and the IPC. A walker of Harmony (Physical), her song amplifies the whole team's power. Her idealism mirrors her brother's but takes the opposite road — believing harmony must be freely chosen, never imposed.
keys: นักร้องโรบิน
68.name: Robin

key: อาเวนทูรีน
69.content: Aventurine is a flamboyant, gambling-obsessed member of the IPC's Ten Stonehearts — born Kakavasha, sole survivor of the massacred Avgin people, blessed at birth by the mother goddess Gaiathra with uncanny luck that lets him survive any gamble. He is not a true Emanator; his Preservation power comes from his Cornerstone ("Aventurine of Stratagems"), a shard of Diamond's Emanator authority. He has pale blond hair with a red streak, lavender eyes and a fur-collared jacket over a teal-gold vest. Beneath the smirking high-roller lies deep trauma and a death wish turned into ruthless strategy; a walker of Preservation (Imaginary), on Penacony he bets his own life in a desperate, brilliant long-game for freedom.
keys: อาเวนทูรีน
69.name: Aventurine

70.content: Topaz is a diligent, well-meaning member of the IPC's Ten Stonehearts from the Strategic Investment Department, who genuinely believes the Corporation's order does more good than harm. She has silver-white hair with a red streak, violet eyes and a bright red-and-white outfit, and is accompanied by Numby, an adorable Warp Trotter (piggy-fox creature) that sniffs out treasure and fights alongside her. A walker of the Hunt (Fire), she and Numby focus-fire and follow up on marked targets. Earnest and hardworking, she is a sympathetic face of the IPC caught between duty and conscience on Penacony.
70.name: Topaz & Numby

key: ผู้เก็บความทรงจำ
71.content: Black Swan is a mysterious, seductive Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection who reads the memory of the world through her Nihility-tinged arts, seeking truths hidden in the past. She has pale lavender hair, amber-gold eyes, and a purple veiled witch-hat with long gloves and a gem choker. A walker of Nihility (Wind), she layers Arcana stacks and detonates stacking damage-over-time. Playful, cryptic and ancient beyond her looks, she guides and tests the Trailblazer on Penacony, trading in secrets and riddles while pursuing the Garden's inscrutable interest in memory and fate.
keys: ผู้เก็บความทรงจำ
71.name: Black Swan

key: ตัวตลกอาฮา
72.content: Sparkle is a theatrical, mask-swapping agent of the Masked Fools who serves Aha, the Aeon of the Elation — a shapeshifting trickster who lives for chaos, deception and the delicious absurdity of it all. She has lavender wavy hair, gold eyes, a jester-witch hat and a kitsune fox-mask at the side of her head, with a manic grin. A walker of Harmony (Quantum), she grants extra turns and boosts allies' damage, twisting the "support" role into pure mischief. Utterly unpredictable and gleefully manipulative, she treats Penacony's crisis as her personal stage and everyone in it as players in a joke only she fully gets.
keys: ตัวตลกอาฮา
72.name: Sparkle

key: คาวบอยอวกาศ
73.content: Boothill is a foul-mouthed cyborg gunslinger and one of the last Galaxy Rangers, waging a one-man war against the IPC after they destroyed his home and family. Most of his body is cybernetic — he has long silver-white hair with black streaks, dark eyes, a visible metal jaw and neck plating, and a grey armored cowboy coat with badges; a censoring device famously replaces his curses with random words. A walker of the Hunt (Physical), he pours on high single-target damage in a reckless standoff style. Behind the outlaw bravado is grief and an unbreakable code — protect the weak, and make the powerful pay.
keys: คาวบอยอวกาศ
73.name: Boothill

key: อัศวินแห่งความงาม
74.content: Argenti is the last and greatest Knight of Beauty — a flamboyant, sincere paladin who roams the galaxy performing heroic deeds in the name of Idrila, his dead goddess of the Beauty, seeking to embody perfect virtue. He has long crimson-red hair, grey eyes and ornate white-and-gold rose-themed armor, and is rarely seen without a red rose in hand. A walker of Erudition (Physical), he charges his power to unleash grand area attacks or a single overwhelming strike. Theatrical, courteous and genuinely selfless, he is comic relief and true hero at once, proving that beautiful, chivalrous acts still matter even after their god is gone.
keys: อัศวินแห่งความงาม
74.name: Argenti
